source: Claude External Audit — Telegram HTTP 403 root cause found

tasks.title: Fix Telegram HTTP 403 — update GITHUB_ISSUE 31→32 in deno_webhook.js
tasks.audit_note: Root cause confirmed: issue #31 reached 2500 comment limit. GitHub blocks new comments with 403. Issue #32 created by Claude. Need to patch deno_webhook.js: GITHUB_ISSUE = 31 → 32.
tasks.example_objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path

p = Path('governance/deno_webhook.js')
content = p.read_text()
assert 'GITHUB_ISSUE  = 31' in content, 'Pattern not found'
new_content = content.replace(
    'const GITHUB_ISSUE  = 31;',
    'const GITHUB_ISSUE  = 32; // migrated from #31 — reached 2500 comment limit 2026-06-04'
).replace(
    '// Версия: v4.9 | BEM-487',
    '// Версия: v5.0 | BEM-487 + issue#32 migration 2026-06-04'
)
assert 'GITHUB_ISSUE  = 32' in new_content, 'Replacement failed'
p.write_text(new_content)
changed_files.append('governance/deno_webhook.js')
print('Patched: GITHUB_ISSUE 31 -> 32')
"""
No issue comments.
tasks.proof_required: governance/deno_webhook.js содержит GITHUB_ISSUE = 32 (проверить через getCodexStatus changed_files)

next_action: Execute GATE-4-FIX using exact example_objective — patch deno_webhook.js
